name: settings-view
author: lumine-code
description: Edit config settings, install packages, and change themes

communityPackageCatalogs.title: Community Package Catalogs
communityPackageCatalogs.description: Ordered catalog repositories or index URLs aggregated by the Install panel. Earlier sources take precedence when package names overlap.

includePulsarPackageResults.title: Include results from the Pulsar package registry
includePulsarPackageResults.description: When searching community packages, also live-search the Pulsar package registry (api.pulsar-edit.dev). Results are fetched per search, never downloaded in bulk.

packageUpdateConcurrency.title: Maximum simultaneous package updates
packageUpdateConcurrency.description: Limit how many processes run simultaneously during package updates. If your machine slows down while updating many packages at once, set this value to a small positive number (e.g., `1` or `2`).

searchSettingsMinimumScore.title: Search Settings Minimum Score to Display Results
searchSettingsMinimumScore.description: Set the minimum similarity score required for a setting to appear in the search results, when searching for settings. Score range is 0.0 to 1.0.

searchSettingsMetadata.title: Display Search Settings Metadata along with Search Results
searchSettingsMetadata.description: Whether or not to display search metadata with the search results. Metadata will appear as `{namespace}.{settingName}:{searchScore}`.

enableSettingsSearch.title: Enable Experimental Settings Search Feature
enableSettingsSearch.description: Will enable or disable the new Experimental Settings Search.

showSettingsIconInStatusBar.title: Show Settings Icon in Status Bar
showSettingsIconInStatusBar.description: Whether or not to show a settings icon in the Lumine Status Bar.

backgroundTips: You can install packages, themes, and customize your editor in Settings with {atom-workspace>settings-view:open}
